column1: Nico Hoerner leads the hit parade tonight, setting the tone atop the Cubs’ lineup at home with a strong 71.5% hit probability and a clear platoon edge against Kyle Backhus. Brice Turang isn’t far behind, bringing his steady bat to the leadoff spot for Detroit and enjoying both a favorable park and a lefty-righty matchup against Casey Mize. Trea Turner and Drake Baldwin round out the top options, each sporting top-of-order roles and reliable profiles, but Hoerner’s combination of matchup and consistency makes him the premium pick for streak chasers.
